calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee On Consent Of Beneficiaries; And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Harrel appeared by telephone for Ryan Ward and Danielle Ward (Petitioners).

Mr. Harrel stated that he reviewed the comments from the Probate Examiner, that he understands the issues, that this is a complicated Client, and that the matter deals with two young Beneficiaries who receive guidance from their Mother and a Sibling Beneficiary who is represented by separate Counsel. Mr. Harrel also stated that he had to deal with Successor Trustee issues, that he had dealings/problems with the Trust protector provision, that there was a subsequent agreement, that he had to explain and communicate everything to the Successor Trustee, and that he negotiated fees. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee on Consent of Beneficiaries, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
